CustomField.description: Used in Mogli SMS Automation for the Initial Outreach for SMS Opt In and Address Verification to ensure the Opt In Message does not exceed the character limit
CustomField.inlineHelpText: 35 Characters. Used in Mogli SMS Automation for the Initial Outreach for SMS Opt In and Address Verification to ensure the Opt In Message does not exceed the character limit
CustomField.label: Account Short Name
